# POST /api/v1/security/user-profiles/search

**Search user profiles**

بحث في ملفات تعريف المستخدمين

Operation ID: `search`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `paginated list of SecUserProfileDto (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| userIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | User ID (shared PK with USERS) | 1 |
| branchIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Assigned active branch ID | 1 |
| fullNameAr | string | No |  | Full name (Arabic) |  |
| fullNameEn | string | No |  | Full name (English) |  |
| preferredLang | string | No |  | Preferred language code |  |
| employeeIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Employee ID (unconstrained — OQ-005, no HR module governed yet) |  |
| isActiveFl | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Creation timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Last update timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |
